de.uka.ilkd.key.api.VariableAssignments

Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.api
This package gives an high-level entry point to the KeY world.

  • Uses of VariableAssignments in de.uka.ilkd.key.api

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.api that return types with arguments of type VariableAssignments
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<VariableAssignments>
    Matcher.matchPattern(String pattern, Sequent currentSeq, VariableAssignments assignments)
    Matches a sequent against a sequent pattern (a schematic sequent) returns a list of Nodes containing matching results from where the information about instantiated schema variables can be extracted.
    List<VariableAssignments>
    ScriptApi.matchPattern(String pattern, Sequent currentSeq, VariableAssignments assignments)
    Matches a sequent against a sequent pattern (a schematic sequent) returns a list of Nodes containing matching results from where the information about instantiated schema variables can be extracted.
